user_goal: 按 MVP PRD §12 与 §4.5 在 B011 Master Portfolio 之后实现 Paper Trading prep MVP：定义 Target Positions 输出格式（百分比 + 美元双输出）、Broker Adapter 抽象接口（无真实 broker SDK 导入）、Mock Broker（JSON Lines append-only journal-only，固定研究账户状态）、Backtest→Paper 桥接（任意时间手动触发），同时保持 fixture/mock-first CI、研究-only 语义、no-live/no-secret/no-network-by-default/no-broker/no-paper/no-AI safety guards。
generator_handoff: Generator completed B012 F001-F005 in one session. New package trade/paper_prep/ with target_positions.py (TargetPositions schema + validate), broker_adapter.py (BrokerAdapter ABC + JournalEntry + OpenOrder + FORBIDDEN_BROKER_SDK_MODULES), mock_broker.py (MockBroker journal-only, deterministic journal_entry_id, fixed USD 250000 account default, gitignored data/paper-prep/ path), bridge.py (generate_target_positions_from_master + generate_target_positions_from_strategy, default-latest period, fail-closed on missing signal_date, account-capacity dollar exposures). New tests/unit/ files: test_target_positions.py (16), test_broker_adapter.py (7), test_mock_broker.py (11), test_paper_prep_bridge.py (13), test_paper_prep_safety_guards.py (13). Forbidden broker SDK list (ib_insync, alpaca, alpaca_trade_api, futu, futu_api, tiger, tiger_api, tradier, polygon) is regression-scanned across the whole package. Reports/journals/docstrings carry the research-only disclaimer; no paper/live execution language, no API hosts, no os.environ/os.getenv, no socket I/O at construction. Local checks: pytest (219), ruff, compileall, mypy. Evaluator should run F006 L1 verification of forbidden-import scan, journal disclaimer, and bridge fail-closed semantics.

session_notes.planner: 2026-05-13: Closed B011 done wrap-up (removed BL-B010-S2 absorbed, added BL-B011-S2 satellite strategies, session_notes refreshed). User confirmed next batch direction: B012 Paper Trading prep MVP per MVP PRD §12 + §4.5. Decisions captured: (1) Target Positions output emits BOTH percentage weights AND dollar exposures, (2) Mock Broker journal format = JSON Lines append-only immutable (planner recommendation, accepted by user), (3) Mock Broker returns a fixed research account state (default USD 250000 cash, zero open positions), (4) any-time manual trigger via direct function call — bridge does not enforce cadence. Hard boundary: no real broker SDK import (ib_insync / alpaca / futu / tiger / tradier / polygon), no paper-trading API URL, no simulated fills / P&L tracking. Wrote B012 spec and features.json (6 features: F001-F005 generator + F006 codex). Status moved to building for Generator F001.
session_notes.generator: 2026-05-13: B012 F001-F005 completed in one session. F001 trade/paper_prep/target_positions.py (TargetPositions + AccountState + DefensiveAllocation + TargetPositionEntry + SCHEMA_VERSION + DISCLAIMER + validate + JSON round-trip). F002 broker_adapter.py (BrokerAdapter ABC + JournalEntry + OpenOrder + FORBIDDEN_BROKER_SDK_MODULES). F003 mock_broker.py (MockBroker journal-only with deterministic journal_entry_id, default USD 250000 cash, gitignored data/paper-prep/ path, injectable clock, side-effect-free constructor). F004 bridge.py (generate_target_positions_from_master + generate_target_positions_from_strategy bridging MasterPortfolioBacktestResult and MonthlyBacktestResult/RiskParityBacktestResult, default-latest period, fail-closed BridgeError on missing signal_date, account-capacity dollar exposures, deterministic target_positions_id). F005 tests/unit/test_paper_prep_safety_guards.py: forbidden broker SDK imports across paper_prep, forbidden network/credential/frontend imports, forbidden API hosts (alpaca.markets, polygon.io, tradier.com, alpaca-paper, ...), forbidden trade language (paper execution / live execution / broker fill / place_order / submit_order / executed-order), no os.environ/os.getenv, research-only docstrings, MockBroker offline construction, bridge fail-closed regression, no writes to trade/data/fixtures/. Updated mock_broker.py docstring wording to avoid the literal phrases being flagged by the new scanner. Full local checks: pytest (219), ruff, compileall, mypy. Status moved to verifying for F006 Codex.
session_notes.evaluator: 2026-05-14: Completed B012 L1 verification on `.venv/bin/python` (Python 3.11.15). Verified 60 targeted B012 tests plus full suite (219), ruff, compileall, and mypy all passed. Confirmed TargetPositions dual-output schema, BrokerAdapter abstract boundary, MockBroker append-only journal behavior, bridge fail-closed semantics, and forbidden import / network / env / execution-language guards. Noted local system `python3` is 3.9.6, so future runs should keep using `.venv/bin/python`.
